comment.body: Above 6K we will likely see a gamma squeeze higher. Volatility is supplied which is why we won't go down. Id just take puts as hedges (longer duration) and buy calls. Needs a major catalyst, positioning looks similiar to the pre-yen carry trade issues. That doesn't mean there is an event looming, it means that if there is an event that causes some repricing it will be like 10% down

comment.body: Also with the treasury stuff happening (shadow QE). This happens when the treasury issues a ton of t-bills (nothing different than in the biden admin actually). The difference though is that ATI (what the stealth QE is called) relies on the overnight repo to pull cash into the system. That is at $100B or something which is historically incredibly low (MMF's need yield and  T-bills offer better yield than ONRP). This is why the market needs the SLR, to free up more cash. Basically it takes away the feds tools lol
